ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot preparing to dive, mimicking the action of putting on a diving mask. The robot will start with its arms at its sides, then bring them up to simulate putting on a mask, and finally, lower the arms into a diving stance. Frame 1: The arms are at the sides. Frame 2: The robot brings both arms up to face level, palms facing inward. Frame 3: The arms move slightly forward and downward, simulating the action of adjusting the mask. Frame 4: The arms go down to the sides, palms facing inward, in a diving stance. Frame 5: Both arms are lowered, and the wrists rotate slightly upward, mimicking the motion of preparing to dive.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready for action
both arms rise to the face level, palms inward
arms move forward and down, adjusting the mask
arms lower to sides in a ready diving stance
arms extend down, wrists rotate up, preparing to dive
